title: Preliminary Estimates of COVID-19 Burden for 2024-2025 | COVID-19 | CDC
text:
updated COVID-19 hospitalization data are reported to CDC via COVID-NET. Updated reports include both new admissions that have occurred during the reporting week and also patients admitted in previous weeks that may not have been included in earlier reporting to CDC.
